zh-CN.title: 抑郁测评[标准版]

consent.text: 我已知晓本测试仅用于心理状态初筛与自我了解，不构成医疗诊断；出现明显痛苦或自伤想法时我会立即寻求专业帮助。

disclaimer.text: 本报告基于自评数据生成，仅供筛查与自我探索参考，不可替代医疗诊断或治疗建议。

zh-CN.crisis_hotline: 若您出现自伤或自杀想法，请立即联系当地紧急服务或心理危机热线并寻求线下专业支持。

en.title: Depression Screening (Standard)

consent.text: I understand this screening is for self-report only and not a medical diagnosis; I will seek professional help immediately if self-harm thoughts appear.

disclaimer.text: This report is generated from self-report data for screening purposes and does not replace medical diagnosis or treatment.

en.crisis_hotline: If you have self-harm thoughts, contact local emergency services or a crisis hotline immediately.
